VAL-FIX-001.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT tests verify: (1) trigger with prompt containing markdown fences and role prefixes passes sanitized prompt to pipeline, (2) trigger without prompt field defaults to empty string. Both tests PASSED.
tests: should pass sanitized prompt to pipeline when prompt contains dangerous content (VAL-FIX-001)
should default to empty string when prompt is not provided (VAL-FIX-001)

VAL-FIX-002.evidence: PipelineApiImplIT concurrent test verifies two simultaneous triggers for same subscription: one gets 202, other gets 409 with PIPELINE_RUN_ALREADY_EXISTS, neither returns 500. PipelineErrorHandlerTest verifies DataIntegrityViolationException maps to 409. All tests PASSED.
tests: should return one 202 and one 409 when concurrent requests trigger same subscription (VAL-FIX-002)
should return 409 when DataIntegrityViolationException is thrown (VAL-FIX-002)
